news.headline: US to stop funding HIV programmes in South Africa
news.summary: More than eight million South Africans are living with HIV – the highest number of any country in the world.

news.headline: US judge rejects Joe Biden’s lawsuit asking to withhold memoir recordings
news.summary: Biden, a former Democratic president, argued that releasing the recordings would violate his right to privacy.
